title: Spiraling Whirlpool
description:
You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?

options.title: Reach In
options.description: Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold]. Add [red]Writhe[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

conditions: Requires at least one card in your deck that can be enchanted with Spiral
notes:
[gold]Observe[/gold]: Prompts you to select a single card from your deck that can be enchanted with Spiral, then applies the Spiral enchantment to it. Cards eligible for Spiral enchantment include Strike, Defend, and other compatible cards.

[gold]Drink[/gold]: Restores [green]33% of your maximum HP[/green].

[gold]Reach In[/gold]: Grants a random relic and adds one copy of Writhe to your deck. By disrupting the whirlpool's equilibrium, the frigid water carves invisible spirals into your arm.
